name: codex-desktop-plugin
description: Lease-based Codex Desktop auth plugin for materializing, reconciling, and rotating auth manager credentials.

interface.shortDescription: Keeps Codex Desktop synced to an auth-manager lease and reports lease telemetry.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex Desktop plugin that acquires an auth-manager lease, materializes auth into Codex Desktop, reconciles stale local auth, and reports readable lease telemetry for AI workflows.
defaultPrompt: Check the current Codex Desktop lease health and tell me if anything needs rotating.
Ensure Codex Desktop has an active lease and materialized auth.
Show me a compact usage summary for Codex Desktop.
Run the Codex Desktop auth plugin in dry-run mode.
Rotate the Codex Desktop lease now if replacement is recommended.
